title: Adani Group To Invest Rs 33,081 Crore Across Data Centre, Power Plant, Cement Unit In Odisha
description: The Adani Group pledged three large-scale infrastructure projects worth Rs 33,081 crore in Odisha today (8 April), targeting digital infrastructure, energy security and manufacturing. Karan Adani, Managing Director of Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone, detailed the initiatives at a groundbreaking and inauguration ceremony for 36 industrial projects in Khordha, marking the conglomerate's continued expansion in the state.The first project involves a data centre at Info Valley, Bhubaneswar, wit
